summary: The video shows a highway scene with multiple trucks traveling in both directions. The road features clear lane markings and signage indicating prohibitions and mandatory directions. Trucks are seen moving steadily along the lanes.

events_timeline.event: Multiple trucks are traveling on the highway, maintaining their lanes and speeds.

uncertainties: Exact speed and direction of trucks are unclear due to limited visibility.
Presence of additional vehicles beyond the three trucks is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: All trucks are moving steadily without any apparent deviations or collisions.
